gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/124)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/124)
text: قَالَ لِي وَيْحَكَ يَا أَبَا الرَّبِيعِ لَا تَطْلُبَنَّ الرِّئَاسَةَ وَ لَا تَكُنْ ذِئْباً وَ لَا تَأْكُلْ بِنَا النَّاسَ فَيُفْقِرَكَ اللَّهُ وَ لَا تَقُلْ فِينَا مَا لَا نَقُولُ فِي أَنْفُسِنَا فَإِنَّكَ مَوْقُوفٌ وَ مَسْئُولٌ لَا مَحَالَةَ فَإِنْ كُنْتَ صَادِقاً صَدَّقْنَاكَ وَ إِنْ كُنْتَ كَاذِباً كَذَّبْنَاكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Abu Al Rabie al Shamy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said to me: ‘Woe be unto you, O Abu Al-Rabie! You should neither seek the leadership, nor become a wolf, nor devour the people by us<sup>asws</sup> so Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Impoverish you, and do not say regarding us<sup>asws</sup> what we<sup>asws</sup> are not saying regarding ourselves<sup>asws</sup>, for you would be made to pause and would inevitably be questioned. So if you were truthful, we<sup>asws</sup> would ratify you, and if you were a liar, we<sup>asws</sup> would belie you’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from abu al- Rabi’ al-Shami who has said the following: “Once abu Ja’far (a.s.) said to me, ‘Woe upon you, O abu al-Rabi’, do not seek leadership and do not be a wolf, do not eat people (consume their properties) through us so Allah makes you poor, do not say about us what we do not say about ourselves. One day you will be made to stand up (before the Judge) and will inevitably be questioned. Had you been a truthful person, we, approve you and, had you been lying, we will declare you a liar.’”
